items.title: ‘Jana Nayagan’ leak case: Madras High Court denies anticipatory bail to one of the accused
items.summary: Justice G.K. Ilanthiraiyan refuses to grant the relief pursuant to the submissions made by Additional Public Prosecutor K.M.D. Muhilan

items.title: Missing Indigenous Girl in Australia Is Found Dead After 5-Day Search
items.summary: The police are seeking a man who was last seen holding hands with the 5-year-old girl on Saturday night near Alice Springs.

items.title: Bank of England hints at higher rates as Iran war fuels inflation
items.summary: The Bank of England votes for no immediate change to borrowing costs as it monitors the knock-on effects of the Middle East conflict.
